titleStmt.title: SII 34.47: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 47. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: This is related to the above inscription and seems to be in continuation of the above one as it abruptly begins with the year 29th of the king, obviously Kulōttuṅga I (1099). It records similar sales of their right of worship by five other temple priests on account of similar misappropriations.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu Irupattoṉpatu I tirukkōyililc civabrāhmaṇan kaucikaṉ nakkaṉ vṛṣabha vāhaṉanēṉ nāṉum Ikkōyilil Ittēvar cātti yaruḷun tiruvāparaṇam poṉṉilum parikala paricciṉṉaṅkaḷilu makappaṭa nāṉum nā
pāti Aḻittukkoṇṭu kaṭamaikku kaṭavēnāṉa kācu Irupattoṉpatē nālumākkāṇi Ikkācu Irupattoṉpatē nālumākkāṇiyum Iṟukkamāṭṭāmaiyil Ikkācilē Irupatu kācukku nāṉ Ikkōyililt tiṅkaḷ vaṭṭattuḷēy nāḷ nā
laiyum Ikkōyilil Āticaṇṭēycuvaratēvarkku viṟṟukkuṭutta piramāṇapparicuram kāśyapan pāṇṭaṉ kumāracuvāmi viṟṟukuṭutta piramāṇapparicurappaṭiyē Itukkum piramāṇam Eḻutinēṉ paṉantāḷuṭaiyāṉ kuṭi tāṅki vāṉavaricanēṉ Ivai In Eḻuttu
Itu kaucikaṉ nakkaṉ vṛṣabhavāhanaṉ sa maikku Ivai pāṇ ṭan kumārasvāmi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ tirupparantāḷ vācciyaṉ Utaiya tivākaraṉ tattapaṭṭanēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ vācciyanūruṭaip perumānārāyaṇanēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ
Ivvūr madhyastaṉ neṭṭuruvaṉ cūriyatēvaṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷattuk kaṇakku neṟkuppai Uṭaiya ṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu § yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvite Ikkōyilil civabrāhmaṇan kāśyapaṉ tēvaṉ mā
tēva paṭṭanēṉ nāṉum Ikkōyililittēvar cāttiyaruḷun tiruvāparaṇam poṉṉilum parikala paricciṉṉaṅkaḷilum E Aḻittu koṇṭu kaṭamaikku kaṭavēnāṉa kācu muppattāṟaraiyē kāṇi muntirikai Ikkācu muppattāṟaraiyē kā
ṇi muntirikaiyum Iṟukkamuṭiyāmaiyil Ik lē Irupattaiñcu kācukku nāṉ Ikkōyililt tiṅkaḷ vaṭṭattuṭaiya nāḷ Añcaiyum Ikkōyilil Āticaṇṭēycuvara tēvarkku viṟṟukkuṭuttēṉ kāśyapaṉ tēvaṉ mātēvapaṭṭanēṉ nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta piramā
kuṭutta ṇap paricurap paṭṭayattukku
ḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivaṉ makaṉ kāśyapan mātēvapaṭṭan taḻuvakkuḻaintā neḻuttu Ippaṭi cciyaṉ Ūruṭai piramānārāyaṇanēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ Ivvūr [ madhya] staṉ neṭṭuruvaṉ cūriya tēvanēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷa
ttukkaṇakku neṟkuppaiyuṭaiyānēṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu § yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvitē Ikkōyilil civabrāhmaṇan Ātaraiyaṉ civaṉ kā raṉum Ivaṉ tampi civaṉ ṉum Ivaṉ tampi civaṉ muttaṉum Immūvōm nāṅkaḷum Ikkōyilil It
tēvar cāttiyaruḷun tiruvāparaṇam poṉṉilum parikala paricciṉṉaṅ kaḷilum Ippaṭi nāṅkaḷ kaḷom ttukoṇṭa Ikkaṭamaikku kaṭavōmāna kācu muppatteṭṭē Āṟumā mukkāṇi muntirikaik kīḻkkāl Ikkācu vaikka māṭṭāmaiyil Ikkāci
lē Irupattāṟēkālk kācukku Eṅkaḷ nāḷ Añcēkālaiyum Ikkōyilil tiruttāṭakacuvaratēvar kkuṭuttōm Immūvōm nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭu tta piramāṇapparicu kāśyapan pāṇṭan kumāracuvāmi viṟṟukkuṭutta piramāṇap paricurappaṭiyē Itukku
ppiramāṇam Eḻutinēṉ paṉantāḷuṭaiyāṉ kuṭi tāṅki vāṉavaricanēṉ Ivai muttu Āttiraiyaṉ Āṉamaikku Ivai kuṭi tāṅki vāṉavaricaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āttiraiyān bhāskaraṉ tiruvāni caṇṭēśvaramuṭaiyānēṉ Ivai En Eḻuttu
Āttiraiyaṉ bhāskaraṉ tillaivaṉamuṭaiyāṉ sa Āṉa I ruvāniśvaramuṭaiyāṉ sa Āṉa I puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷattuk kaṇakku neṟkuppaiyuṭaiyāṉ vēḷāṉ cōṟuṭaiyānēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēn
paruvaṉ cūriyatēvamā kāśyappaṉ tēva Ittē
var śrīpaṇṭārañ cōtittu Ittēvar cūṭun tiruvāparaṇaṅkaḷi kācu vaikkaveṉṟu nāṅkaḷ Aṭai ciṟaiya lil ntāmōtiraṉum tāmōtiraṉ tēvaṉum Oḷittup po
Digital edition of SII 34.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
